\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Provides methods for Gauss quadrature. 

This class includes static methods for computing Gauss-\/\+Legendre integration depending on finite element types (coming from PASSMO). 

Definition at line 4076 of file Arcane\+Fem\+Functions.\+h.

\index{getRefPosition@{getRefPosition}!ArcaneFemFunctions::FemGaussQuadrature@{ArcaneFemFunctions::FemGaussQuadrature}}
\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{getRefPosition()}{getRefPosition()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily static Real Arcane\+Fem\+Functions\+::\+Fem\+Gauss\+Quadrature\+::get\+Ref\+Position (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{Integer}]{indx,  }\item[{Integer}]{ordre }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [inline]}, {\ttfamily [static]}}



Provides the position of a Gauss Point in the reference (local) element coordinates, depending on the index of the Gauss Point and integration order chosen by user (coming fro PASSMO). 

This method is generic (not depending on the finite element type) and is called by specialized methods (depending on FE type)
